# growthbook_fact_table_filter (Resource)

A GrowthBook fact table filter: a named, reusable SQL expression scoped to a single fact table.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "growthbook_fact_table_filter" "us_only" {
  fact_table_id = growthbook_fact_table.orders.id
  name          = "US only"
  value         = "country = 'US'"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fact_table_id` (String) ID of the fact table this filter belongs to. Changing this forces a new filter.
- `name` (String) Human-readable filter name.
- `value` (String) SQL expression for this filter (e.g. `country = 'US'`).

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the filter.
- `managed_by` (String) Where the filter is managed from: empty or `api`. Set to `api` to disable editing in the GrowthBook UI (the fact table must also be `api`).

### Read-Only

- `date_created` (String) Creation timestamp (RFC3339).
- `date_updated` (String) Last update timestamp (RFC3339).
- `id` (String) Unique fact table filter identifier.
